title: lithospermum album
intro: Lithospermum album, also known as Meadow Germander or Gypsy Flower, is a flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its compounds such as lithospermic acid and baicalein. The health benefits of Lithospermum album include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Lithospermum album can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional medicine formulations.
